professionalSummary.intro: Senior software engineer and engineering leader with 15+ years of experience building scalable e-commerce platforms, marketplace integrations, and distributed systems. Proven ability to own technical foundations, make architectural decisions, and ship production systems in fast-paced startup environments. Seeking founding engineer role to leverage full-stack expertise and leadership experience building core platforms from zero.
keyStrengths: Led event-driven architecture and microservices development for high-traffic marketplace platforms (Carousell)
Built and owned inventory-sync backend integrating Carousell sellers with Shopify, serving thousands of merchants
Full-stack development across frontend (React, Next.js, TypeScript) and backend (Golang, Python, Node.js)
Cross-functional team leadership managing 6 engineers across QA, Backend, Web, iOS, and Android
Technical architecture and decision-making for e-commerce platforms serving Southeast Asian markets

Built marketplace frontend systems (OxStreet.com) using Next.js and TypeScript, mentoring team on type-safe development practices
Contributed to FPT.SmartCore enterprise framework, enabling rapid business feature development across web and desktop applications
